engine: Gasoline engines, including 2ZR-FAE and M20A-FKS where equipped

maintenance.service: Rotate tires; inspect wiper blades, fluid levels, and brake linings/pads
maintenance.notes: Toyota maintenance log page 38 starts the 5,000-mile service pattern.

maintenance.service: Replace engine oil and oil filter

interval.logic: Every 10,000 miles or 12 months when the specified oil is used

maintenance.notes: Use 5,000 miles or 6 months under listed special operating conditions or if the specified oil was not used.
More frequent replacement may be needed in heavy traffic, dirt, urban, desert, or dusty areas.
Dusty-road operation calls for earlier inspection.

maintenance.service: Inspect major chassis, brake, steering, cooling, exhaust, and fuel-system items

interval.logic: Inspection cluster appears at 30,000-mile maintenance intervals

maintenance.notes: Includes ball joints, brake lines/hoses, brake linings/pads, drive shaft boots, coolant, exhaust, fuel lines, radiator/condenser, steering gear/linkage, and transmission leakage checks.

maintenance.service: Replace CVT fluid or transmission oil
maintenance.notes: Do not present as normal-use service; applies to towing/heavy loading and extensive idling/low-speed use as specified.

applicability: SE CVT VIN test case is covered as a gasoline Corolla candidate
validation_flags: Candidate rebuilt from official Toyota warranty and maintenance guide.
Manual-vs-CVT applicability and special-condition transmission service must be checked before production.
Rendered-page verification still required before production integration.
